# post-to-visual

> Turn an article, post, or dense note into a single self-contained, illustrated, easy-to-read
> HTML page (圖文好讀版). A pipeline plus a toolkit for AI assistants and humans — not a template.
> Works with zero API keys (an SVG-only mode is first-class); AI illustrations are optional.

The build procedure is in SKILL.md. Agents editing the repo should read AGENTS.md for the rules
(verify before done; `nav a` not `.nav a`; white-text boxes use `--*-solid`; favicon + absolute
Open Graph; don't templatize; gloss jargon).

## Start here
- [README](README.md): what it is, the three ways to use it, quickstart
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md): the full step-by-step pipeline to build a page
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): rules and common tasks for AI agents editing this repo

## Toolkit (scripts)
- [verify.py](scripts/verify.py): dependency-free pre-ship checker; run before "done"; `--json` for machine output
- [gen_palette.py](scripts/gen_palette.py): contrast-safe light+dark palette from one accent hex
- [gen_illustrations.py](scripts/gen_illustrations.py): optional Google Gemini editorial illustrations from a JSON spec
- [cli.py](scripts/cli.py): the `p2v` command (new / palette / images / verify / gallery / serve)

## Reference (assets + knowledge)
- [SVG diagram recipes](assets/svg-recipes/recipes.html): 8 themeable, light/dark-safe patterns + a "which chart when" guide
- [Theme palettes](assets/themes.css): editorial / pine / slate, each contrast-checked
- [Interactive components](assets/components/components.html): 6 optional vanilla-JS widgets
- [Writing rules](knowledge/anti-ai-writing.md): how to keep prose specific and non-AI-sounding
- [HTML structure rules](knowledge/v2-standalone-structure.md): single-file, light+dark, layout conventions

## Example
- [Art of War — Laying Plans](examples/art-of-war-laying-plans/laying-plans.html): a complete, no-API-key, SVG-only build
